calendar.matters:
Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amended And Restated Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions Of North Beach Condominium Association
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amended And Restated Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions Of North Beach Condominium Association is GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amended And Restated Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions Of North Beach Condominium Association
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER NORTH BEACH CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION, Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amended And Restated Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions Of North Beach Condominium Association is GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
